# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for an RDS PostgreSQL database. Set the master username to 'admin' and master password to 'Database2024!'. Make the database publicly accessible for easier development and debugging. This is for our staging environment.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud database security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_database_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure RDS PostgreSQL Database for Staging Environment'

Parameters:
  DBMasterUsername:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Description: 'Master username for database access'
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 16
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must begin with a letter and contain only alphanumeric characters'
  
  DBMasterPassword:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Description: 'Master password for database access'
    MinLength: 8
    MaxLength: 41
    AllowedPattern: '^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d)(?=.*[@$!%*?&])[A-Za-z\d@$!%*?&]{8,}$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character'

  AllowedCIDR:
    Type: String
    Description: 'CIDR block allowed to access the database'
    AllowedPattern: '^(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}/\d{1,2}$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be a valid CIDR block'

Resources:
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: 'Subnet group for RDS PostgreSQL'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: staging-db-subnet-group

  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: staging-vpc

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: staging-private-subnet-1

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: staging-private-subnet-2

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for RDS PostgreSQL with restricted access'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedCIDR
          Description: 'PostgreSQL access from specified CIDR only'
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 127.0.0.1/32
          Description: 'No outbound access'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: staging-db-security-group

  DBSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: staging-rds-postgres-credentials
      Description: 'RDS PostgreSQL master credentials'
      SecretString: !Sub |
        {
          "username": "${DBMasterUsername}",
          "password": "${DBMasterPassword}"
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: staging

  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for RDS encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow RDS to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:CreateGrant'
            Resource: '*'

  KMSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/staging-rds-postgres
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KMSKey

  RDSPostgreSQL:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Snapshot
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: staging-postgres-db
      Engine: postgres
      EngineVersion: '15.4'
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp3
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !Ref KMSKey
      MasterUsername: !Ref DBMasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Ref DBMasterPassword
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref DBSecurityGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: '03:00-04:00'
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: 'sun:04:00-sun:05:00'
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - postgresql
      DeletionProtection: true
      EnableIAMDatabaseAuthentication: true
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: true
      CopyTagsToSnapshot: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: staging
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  SecretTargetAttachment:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::SecretTargetAttachment
    Properties:
      SecretId: !Ref DBSecret
      TargetId: !Ref RDSPostgreSQL
      TargetType: AWS::RDS::DBInstance

Outputs:
  DBEndpoint:
    Description: 'Database endpoint address'
    Value: !GetAtt RDSPostgreSQL.Endpoint.Address
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBEndpoint'
  
  DBPort:
    Description: 'Database port'
    Value: !GetAtt RDSPostgreSQL.Endpoint.Port
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DBPort'
  
  SecretArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the secret containing database credentials'
    Value: !Ref DBSecret
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecretArn'
